query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mealPlanIntake (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  goals TEXT NOT NULL,
  weightLbs INT,
  targetWeightLbs INT,
  heightInches INT,
  age INT,
  sex ENUM('male','female','other'),
  activityLevel ENUM('sedentary','light','moderate','active','very_active'),
  dietaryRestrictions TEXT,
  healthConditions TEXT,
  mealsPerDay INT DEFAULT 3,
  includeSnacks INT DEFAULT 1,
  additionalNotes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mealPlans (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  planDate VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  planJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  totalCalories INT,
  totalProteinG INT,
  totalCarbsG INT,
  totalFatG INT,
  completed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_mealPlans_userId_date (userId, planDate)
);
